title: The Hotel Room Mystery
content: Guests staying in Room 214 frequently reported hearing furniture moving late at night. Hotel staff carefully inspected the room but found nothing unusual. Eventually, an engineer examined the building's ventilation system. Strong air flowing through hidden ducts caused a loose decorative panel to vibrate against the wall whenever the heating system activated. The unusual sound echoed through the quiet room, creating the illusion that heavy furniture was being moved. Once the panel was secured, the mysterious noises disappeared completely.
